relationships.context: Built using GPT-4 as the underlying language model
Uses custom prompts optimized for career coaching conversations
Tool designed to help job seekers structure career transitions
Generates skills assessments as an output
Generates transition plans as an output
Measures writing quality across warmth, confidence, precision dimensions
Evaluates writing appropriateness for target context (e.g., investor-appropriate)
Values strong proof points and human detail in writing
200+ career coaches use the tool to scale their practice
